title: 'Historic Milestone': PM Modi Congratulates Scientists For Achieving First Criticality At Fast Breeder Nuclear Reactor In Kalpakkam
description: Fast Breeder Reactors are a cornerstone of India's long-term nuclear strategy. Unlike conventional thermal reactors, the PFBR uses Uranium-Plutonium Mixed Oxide (MOX) fuel. The core of PFBR is surrounded by a blanket of Uranium-238.
